metadata.description: Claude Code skill for validating and auditing AWS IAM policies via the iam-policy-validator CLI.

plugins.name: iam-policy-validator
plugins.description: AWS IAM policy validation, analysis, and security auditing. Provides a SKILL.md that teaches Claude Code how to use the iam-validator CLI to check policies against 22 built-in checks, run AWS Access Analyzer, query AWS service definitions, and post findings to GitHub PRs.
